text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today is the first day of summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Did you hear? Vodka's coming to camp this time.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... And this was the perfect chance to pull ahead of her too. Just my luck...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I guess this means we're starting on the same
playing field—no advantages one way or the
other.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll need to give it my all in the autumn Tenno Sho
to beat her and become number one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This summer, I'm going to train harder than ever
before! I'll do whatever it takes to become the
number one Umamusume!
